url_shortener.title: url shortener - solitar
url_shortener.description: Create short URLS for your website and social media pages in seconds

qr_generator.title: qr code generator - solitar
qr_generator.description: Create QR code for your URLS in seconds, save and share it immediately

feature.title: What comes with Solitar?
feature.subtitle: Everything you need when work with URLs

speed.title: Blazingly Fast
speed.description: Instant redirects with zero latency. No middleman pages or ad-interstitials.

analytics.title: Privacy-Focused Analytics
analytics.description: Track click counts and referrers without harvesting personal user data.

api.title: Developer First
api.description: Powerful REST API to automate link creation within your own applications.

expiration.title: Flexible Expiry
expiration.description: Set links to live forever or schedule them to self-destruct after a specific time.

security.title: Security Verification
security.description: Warns users when they access websites that do not comply with security standards.

open_source.title: Open Source
open_source.description: Fully transparent redirection logic. Audit the code, host it yourself.

password.min: Password must be at least 3 characters

alias.min: Alias must be at least 7 characters

expire_time.invalid: Expiration time must be a number
expire_time.min: Expiration time must be greater than 0

counter: {count} links created that have been accessed {clicks} times

hero.title: The all-in-one tool that you need.
hero.subtitle_1: Solitar is an open source, powerful, everyday platform that lets you shorten long links, create instant QR codes.
hero.subtitle_2: Solitar delivers instant redirects with zero ad-interstitials, automate your workflow with our REST API and set flexible expiration dates for your links.

not_secure_warning.title: Your connection is not private
not_secure_warning.description: The link you're about to visit does not use HTTPS, which means your connection is not encrypted. Your data could be intercepted by third parties.

unlock.title: The URL is locked
unlock.description: The link you're about to visit has been locked by the creator. Please provide a password to unlock it

error.url_expired: This URL is no longer available
error.url_disabled: This URL has been disabled due to violation of terms
error.password_protected: Please provide a valid password to unlock this URL
